ogTitle: Ensay North vs Eppalock: Climate Safety

heading: Ensay North vs Eppalock — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ensay North, Victoria and Eppalock, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ensay North has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Eppalock (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ensay North or Eppalock safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ensay North has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Eppalock scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ensay North scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Eppalock scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ensay North or Eppalock?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ensay North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
